en.title: Android Developer
en.description: Developed native mobile applications and client integrations at Asa Technology Group. Collaborated with backend engineers to consume REST APIs and implement robust mobile workflows.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Designed and implemented app features using **Kotlin** and **Java** under MVP/MVVM architectures.
Integrated network clients with **Retrofit** and local databases using **Room**.
Optimized UI layout performance and eliminated memory leaks, improving overall app speed and stability.

en.title: Senior Android / SDK Engineer
en.description: Leading the development and maintenance of Adivery's mobile advertising SDKs and integration plugins. Assisting thousands of publishers in integrating monetizing tools in their apps.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Developed and optimized **Android SDK core features** using Kotlin and Java with a focus on performance and minimal app size impact.
Maintained and updated cross-platform plugins for **React Native** and **Unity**.
Implemented user privacy compliance features including GDPR dialogs and consent flows.
Collaborated with developers and publishers to troubleshoot integration problems and improve technical documentation.
